title: Define and spike the simulation Worker protocol
summary: Implement typed command, snapshot, UI-delta, lifecycle and error envelopes between client and authoritative simulation Worker, including protocol version rejection.
acceptance: Main thread cannot mutate simulation state directly
Protocol messages carry explicit schema/protocol version
Unknown or stale commands fail with structured reason codes
Round-trip integration test works in browser Worker and Node test harness

history.details: Implemented typed simulation Worker protocol envelopes, boundary validation, structured reason codes, minimal authoritative worker state machine, Node and Worker-port round-trip tests; owner recheck confirmed literal required checks pass and protocol files are split below review thresholds.
verified: No blocking findings; acceptance evidence confirmed for Worker protocol spike
Verified branch task/WM-0005-worker-protocol at 1fb2ccc; required protocol checks and reviewer verification passed.

review.summary: No blocking findings; acceptance evidence confirmed for Worker protocol spike
